name: Cadmium sensor (CadR + CRISPRi)
shortDescription: Detects cadmium in industrial wastewater. A CadR/CadC metal-responsive regulator gates a CRISPRi circuit driving a fluorescent reporter, in the robust GRAS industrial chassis Corynebacterium glutamicum.

input.operatingRange: CadR/CadC respond from sub-µM to µM Cd(II)

sensing.sensorMechanism: A CadR/CadC-family metalloregulator switches the cad promoter on cadmium binding.
sensing.signalFlow: Cd(II) -> CadR switches Pcad -> anti-reporter sgRNA -> CRISPRi inverts a constitutive reporter (NOT). Pair an inverter for turn-on.

parts.name: sgRNA
parts.source: designed against / upstream of the reporter promoter

parts.name: dCas9
parts.source: Cleto et al. 2016 (CRISPRi in C. glutamicum)

performance.notes: CadR/CadC cadmium sensing and C. glutamicum CRISPRi are validated separately; integrated device is a design template. C. glutamicum tolerates harsh industrial samples.

safety.notes: GRAS, robust for industrial wastewater monitoring.

buildSteps.title: Design sgRNA
buildSteps.description: Target/position the sgRNA; check C. glutamicum off-targets.

buildSteps.title: Assemble units
buildSteps.description: Sensor -> sgRNA; dCas9; reporter. Use the host's standard toolkit.

buildSteps.title: Transform C. glutamicum
buildSteps.description: Transform, select, and confirm low background.

buildSteps.title: Expose to sample
buildSteps.description: Incubate with the sample plus a cadmium standard curve.

provenance.source: Design template combining a CadR cadmium-sensing module with C. glutamicum CRISPRi
partsSources: Cleto et al. 2016 (CRISPRi in C. glutamicum)
provenance.license: Parts per their original sources; design template CC BY 4.0
